summary: Iteration 132: Payment Schedule Split Bug Fix - ALL 8 UNIT TESTS PASS. The financial service correctly splits supplier invoice amounts into multiple installments based on scadenze_pagamento array (e.g., 'RIBA 30-60 gg'). Both get_payables_aging() and get_cashflow_forecast() now handle individual rate correctly.

payment_schedule_split.test_payables_aging_with_installments: PASS - Invoice 10000€ with RIBA 30-60 generates 2 rows of 5000€ each with 'Rata 1', 'Rata 2' labels
payment_schedule_split.test_payables_aging_partial_paid: PASS - Only unpaid rata shown when one rata is pagata=True
payment_schedule_split.test_payables_aging_legacy_single: PASS - Fallback to data_scadenza_pagamento + residuo for invoices without scadenze_pagamento
payment_schedule_split.test_payables_aging_mixed: PASS - Mix of 3-rate invoice + legacy invoice = 4 detail rows correctly
payment_schedule_split.test_payables_aging_overdue_installments: PASS - Overdue rate have days_overdue > 0 and urgency='scaduta'
payment_schedule_split.test_aging_bucket_classification: PASS - Future rates correctly classified in aging buckets

cashflow_forecast_installments.test_cashflow_forecast_excludes_paid_ins: PASS - Paid rata excluded from cash outflow forecast

payment_calculator_functions.calculate_due_dates: PASS - All 6 tests pass (A Vista, 30gg, 60gg DFFM, 30gg FM+10, 2-rate split, empty inputs)
payment_calculator_functions.calc_scadenze_from_supplier: PASS - Looks up supplier payment type and calculates installments

critical_code_review_comments: financial_service.py get_payables_aging() correctly iterates through scadenze_pagamento array when present
Unpaid rate filtered via: unpaid_scadenze = [s for s in scadenze if not s.get('pagata')]
Detail entries include 'Rata {n}' suffix in numero field for multi-installment invoices
Legacy invoices (empty scadenze_pagamento) fallback to data_scadenza_pagamento + residuo works correctly
get_cashflow_forecast() now iterates through installments for accurate cash outflow projection
MongoDB MOCKED in unit tests via unittest.mock.patch with FakeCollection/FakeCursor classes
test_credentials: Unit tests use mocked MongoDB - no real database access required
seed_data_creation: None - all test data is mocked
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment schedule split fix verified. The scadenzario fornitori now correctly splits supplier invoice amounts into multiple installments from scadenze_pagamento array. Key changes: 1) get_payables_aging() reads scadenze_pagamento and generates separate detail entries per rata, 2) get_cashflow_forecast() iterates through installments for accurate projection. MongoDB is MOCKED in unit tests. Live API testing requires Google OAuth authentication.
mocked_api_note: MongoDB database mocked via unittest.mock.patch with FakeCollection/FakeCursor classes in unit tests
